description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful, anime-inspired appearance, featuring pale skin and large, expressive eyes. The doll is dressed in a white, long-sleeved top with pink accents and a short red plaid skirt, complemented by thigh-high black stockings. Its footwear consists of white, high-heeled boots adorned with bows and pom-poms. The doll's hair is pastel pink, styled into voluminous twin pigtails with curled ends and white hair accessories. A round, pink purse is attached to the doll's right hip, adding a playful touch. The overall design is detailed, with a focus on fashionable, schoolgirl-inspired attire and a whimsical, collectible aesthetic.
description: A detailed, anime-style doll with pink pigtails, a white top, red plaid skirt, and high-heeled boots, accessorized with a round purse and hair ornaments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the doll's twin pigtails, back of the white top, plaid skirt, and boots with bows.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the doll's side silhouette, pigtail, and the round purse attached at the hip.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's facial features, pink pigtails, white top, plaid skirt, and detailed boots.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the side of the face, pigtail, and the round purse at the hip.
attribute_clothing_style: Japanese schoolgirl-inspired outfit with a white, long-sleeved fitted top featuring pink trim, a short red plaid pleated skirt, thigh-high black stockings, and white high-heeled boots with bows and pom-poms. The look is accessorized with a round pink purse and white hair ornaments, evoking a Harajuku or anime fashion influence.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms extended slightly outward and downward, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and balanced.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed mouth, large eyes open and looking forward, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, pastel pink hair styled into two high, voluminous pigtails with curled ends and white hair accessories.
